source_file: 20260105维信诺标准工作清单（外部门）.xlsx
note: Maps the 5 portfolio-analysis dimensions to the real spreadsheet columns. See phase0-source-structure.md for full column structure and data caveats.

dimensions.description: Year the standard project was initiated. Bucketed by year; group by decade where useful for visualization.
dimensions.normalization_note: Date formats are inconsistent (2014/4/24, 2014年2月, 2025/06月) -- normalize to YYYY before grouping. Treat missing date as unknown.

dimensions.source_column_header: 主导单位 + 参与单位
dimensions.description: Whether Visionox-group is leading, participating, or absent. Category derived from which companies appear in col I (lead) and col J (participants).

role_dimension.participant: col J 参与单位 (multi-value cell, split on delimiters)

category_values.match_rule: col I contains 维信诺 or 国显光电 (Q/320583)
col J contains 维信诺/国显光电 but col I does not
col I is TCL华星/京东方/天马/OPPO/etc. and col J does not include Visionox
col I contains 清华大学/大学/研究院/etc.

dimensions.split_note: 参与单位 is a multi-company cell. Split on common delimiters: 、, ,, ;, slash. After split, classify each participating company.

dimensions.description: The administrative level of the standard in the Chinese standardization hierarchy. 7 levels observed.
dimensions.hierarchy_order: international > military > national > industry > local > group > enterprise
dimensions.key_note: 序号 re-numbers within each 标准类型 block. Use (标准类型, 序号) or 标准号 as unique key, not 序号 alone.

dimensions.description: Current lifecycle status of the standard. Maturity dimension from in-progress to published.
dimensions.maturity_order: 立项 < 立项通过 < 征求意见 < 报批 < 公开 < 发布

dimensions.description: The technical committee or organization responsible for the standard. Determines the domain and oversight chain.

values_observed.label: 中关村半导体照明联盟
中国电子视像行业协会
中国电子材料行业协会

dimensions.note: Directly derived from col K. Some standards may have no归口 entry -- classify as unknown.

key_field_for_uniqueness: Use (标准类型, 序号) or 标准号 as the unique row key. 序号 alone is NOT unique -- it restarts per 标准类型 block.
data_ingestion_note: Source xlsx is DRM-encrypted via DingTalk. Only screen-capture / manual transcription is available until a clean export is provided. 83 rows verified from 4 screenshots.
